violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (milk) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025

Milk and cream were observed held at 48-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Air flow was blocked, PIC fixed at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025

Refrigerator #1 located in the front kitchen area was not in good repair, ambient temperature of 48 degrees Fahrenheit. All TCS foods moved to another refrigerator at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the hand wash sink have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025
